{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Evven-Fahr system
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Galactic Union]] achieved a victory in the [[Evven-Fahr system]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3">''The Captain'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
